faq.answer: Yes. The converted PDF is designed to be printable and convenient for forms, portfolios, and shared documents.

faq.question: Does this preserve image quality?
faq.answer: Yes. The converter keeps the original image quality in the generated PDF while making it easier to share and print.

about_formats.title: What is JPG?
